title: Expansion Release
concept: Reading the release out of compression, and separating a real initiative break from a false stop-sweep at the retest
teaching_objective: Teach the trader to treat volatility as a cycle: prepare during compression (mark both edges and the dominant node, size stops for the coming expansion regime, pre-write a plan per break direction), then on release withhold the trade through the edge and decide real vs false at the retest, switching tactic families the moment a real break is confirmed.
junior_error: Regime misclassification at the transition: trading the coil with coil-sized expectations, fading mid-range out of boredom with a coil-sized stop sitting inside the edge stop-cluster, then getting filled in the acceleration when the edge releases. Plus trading the first tick of the break instead of the retest answer.
professional_read: During the coil, mark the edges (5462 and 5438) and the node (5450), and re-derive stop size for an expansion regime. On the break, read the post-stop-burst flow: if fresh initiative keeps lifting and the retest holds outside with value building, it is a real release (buy the held retest, expansion-sized stop); if the tape goes quiet beyond the sweep and price snaps back inside, it is a false break (fade back toward the opposite edge, chasers as fuel).
decision_consequence: Switch tactic families on a confirmed real break (stop fading edges, trade pullbacks in the displacement direction, stop sized for expansion). On a false break, trade the failed-break fade. Carry a coil-sized stop into expansion and it is executed in the first minutes of the release at the worst fill of the week.

required_evidence.label: Compression coil: shrinking ranges, value overlap, dominant high-volume node
Stop fuel clustered just beyond the compressed edge
Expansion release: drive leaves balance on rising volume
Retest evidence: held outside with initiative (real) vs snap back inside (false)
Regime-sized stop and tactic switch: a coil stop will not survive expansion

forbidden_errors.description: Trading the first tick through the edge instead of waiting for the retest answer (trading the question, not the answer).
Pre-committing a directional thesis from the coil alone; compression is direction-agnostic.
Carrying a coil-calibrated stop into the expansion regime, where it is executed in the first minutes of the release.

sequence.caption: Compression coil. ES ranges 38, 31, 26 points over three sessions, value stacking, fat node at 5450.
Preparation. Edges marked at 5462 and 5438; stop fuel clusters just beyond both.
Release. The 5462 edge breaks and the stop cluster executes on rising volume.
The retest fork. Stops are spent. The answer is here, not at the break.
Real branch. Fresh initiative keeps lifting, the pullback holds 5466 with bids refreshing, value builds, run to 5484. Buy the held retest with an expansion-sized stop.
False branch. The tape goes quiet beyond the sweep, no second buyer, price snaps back inside toward 5438, chasers trapped. Trade the failed-break fade.

annotations.text: Answer is at the retest, not the break

fixture.description: Synthetic ES volatility cycle. Three compressing sessions (ranges 38, 31, 26 points), value stacking with a dominant node at 5450, edges 5462 and 5438. Release breaks 5462 and consumes the stop cluster. Real branch: fresh initiative continues, pullback holds 5466 with bids refreshing, value builds outside, run to 5484. False branch: no second buyer beyond the sweep, snap back inside toward 5438, chasers trapped.
fixture.notes: Numbers taken from the Compression-vs-Expansion and Compression-Breakouts worked examples in CH08 so the fixture can be checked against the manuscript.

acceptance_criteria: The compression coil and the expansion release are both drawn as phases of one cycle, not as a single breakout event.
Stop fuel is shown clustered beyond the compressed edge before the release.
Both the real (held retest, initiative continuation, value migration) and false (snap back inside, no second buyer) resolutions are shown from the retest fork.
The stop is shown re-sized for the expansion regime, not the coil.
Every required_evidence id is rendered and stamped (render-evidence check passes).
